titleStmt.title: SII 5.521: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 521. (A.R. No. 222 of 1894). ON THE BASE OF THE NORTH, WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svisti śrī . tirumakaḷ polap perunilac celviyum taṉakke yurimai pūṇṭamai manakkoḷak k(ā)n=tannū rccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaiñāṭum kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭiyum taṭikaipāṭiyum kuṭamalaiñāṭum kollamum kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟittaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa taṉneḻil vaḷaruḻiyuḷ ḷellā yāṇṭum toḻuteḻa viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrīkovirājarājakesaripanma rāṉa śrīrājarājade varkku yāṇṭu 2 10 4 Āvatu Uṭaiyārśrīrājarājade var nampirāṭṭiyār taṉticattiviṭaṅkiyārāna śrīolokamāde viyār vaṭakarai rājentrasiṁ havaḷanāṭṭup poykaināṭṭu tiruvai yāṟṟuppāl nām Eṭuppitta tirukkaṟṟaḷi Olokamāde viīśva ramuṭaiya ma hāde varkkum Olokaviṭaṅkadeva ruḷḷiṭṭa tirumenikaḷukkum ceyvitta poṟkoḷkai mutaliya Uḷḷa tiruvābha ra- ṇaṅkaḷum tirupparikalaṅkaḷum kallile veṭṭuvikka venṟu Uṭanakūṭṭattu Atikāram ceykiṉṟa kovalūruṭ Ai yān kāṭan ṉūṟṟeṇmanai yum Atikāricci Erutan kuñciramalliyaiyum Ariḷicceyya kalveṭṭiṉapaṭi koḷkaittevar vaḷaiyi liraṇ ṭuḷpaṭak kuṭiñaikkallālp pon niṟai muvāyirattiruṉūṟṟeḻupattu mukkaḻañcum paṭṭam muṉṟināl poṉ niṟai Eṇpattoṉpatan kaḻañceykālum ponnin tāmaraippoṟpū Oṉṟināl niṟai patiṉ kaḻañcum Olokaviṭaṅkade var cāttiaruḷum muṭi Oṉṟu pon niṟai nūṟṟai ṅkaḻañca
raiyum meṟpaṭiyil kaṭṭina māṇikkam Irupattoṉṟum vayiram ṉūṟṟiraṇṭum nila monṟum tarup paṟupattunālum potti yeḻupattoṉpatum saprayoga miruṉūṟṟu nāṟpatum meṟpaṭiyil kaṭṭina takaṭṭuppon mukkaḻañcum meṟpaṭiyil kottamuttu Aiññūṟṟu Eḻupattumunṟum meṟpaṭiyil kottaveḷḷi kaḻañcu ṭayār cāttuṅ kutampai yonṟupoṉ Irukaḻañcum meṟpaṭiyil kaṭṭiṉa māṇikka moṉṟum tarup pirupattu muṉṟum saprayogam pa tineḻum muttu Irupatteḻum meṟppaṭiyār cāttum kutumpai y Oṉṟu pon niru kaḻañcum meṟpaṭiyil kaṭṭina māṇikkam Oṉṟum taruppu Irupattumuṉṟum saprayoga m patiṉeḻum muttirupatteḻum meṟpaṭiyār cāttum tāḻakkūṭṭukkampi Oraṇaiyiṉāl tuṇṭa miraṇṭum Āṇi Iraṇṭum Uṭpaṭa pon mukkaḻañcaraiye nālumañcāṭiyu miraṇṭumā meṟpaṭiyār cāttum mālai Oṉṟu tāli Irupatteḻum kaṇṭappalakai Iraṇṭum pon Irupatteṇkaḻañce kālum meṟpaṭiyiṟ kaṭṭina saprayoga m Aiympatteḻum taruppu nāṉūṟṟu Aṟupattoṉṟum potti Irupatteḻum meṟpaṭiyiṟ kaṭṭina takaṭṭuppon kaḻañce mukkāle mañcāṭiyum meṟpaṭiyiṟ kotta mutteḻupatum meṟpaṭiyār cārttum taṉivaṭam Oṉṟu muttu nāṟpattiraṇṭum meṟpaṭiyār cāttum tiricaram Oṉṟināl muttu ṉūṟṟeṭṭum muṉṟoṉṟāka Aṭikki viḷakkiṉa tāḷimpam Iraṇṭum paṭukaṇ Oṉṟum kokkuvā yoṉṟum Āka pon kaḻañcaraiye nālumañcāṭiyu miraṇṭumāvum
meṟpaṭiyār cārttum pañcacari yonṟu muttu Iruṉūṟṟorupattunālum poṉniṉ Iṭai kkaṭ ṭiraṇṭum Añconṟāka Aṭuttu viḷakkina tāḷimpa miraṇ ṭum paṭukaṇonṟum kokkuvā yonṟum pon mukkaḻañcaraiye nālumañcāṭiyum meṟpaṭiyār cāttum śrīchchanda monṟināl muka monṟum Iṭai kkaṭṭu nālum tavaḷaivāy nāliyil cavak m pon Irukaḻañce Āṟumañcāṭiyum Āṟu māvum meṟpaṭi mukattil kaṭṭina nāyakamāṇikka(m) moṉṟu niṟai Araikkaḻañcey nālumañcāṭiyum Aṟumāvum saprayoga m Irupatteḻum Itiṟ kotta tiruccaṉavaṭam muṉṟināl muttu Āyirattirunūṟṟeḻupatteṭṭum meṟppaṭiyār cārttum muttiṉ vaḷaiyil Oṉṟu poṉ patiṉkaḻañcaraiye Araikkālum meṟpaṭiyil taccamuttu ṉūṟṟeṇpatteṭṭum meṟpaṭiyār cārttum meṟpaṭi Oṉṟu poṉ Eṇkaḻañcaraiye muṉṟumāvum meṟpaṭiyil(t) tacca muttu nūṟṟorupattonpatum meṟpaṭiyār cāttum meṟpaṭi yoṉṟu poṉ patinkaḻañcey muṉṟu mañcāṭiyu maṟumāvum meṟpaṭiyiṟ ṟacca muttu tūṟṟeṇpattoṉṟum meṟpaṭiyār cāttum meṟpaṭi yoṉṟu ponpatinkaḻañce mañcāṭiyum Iraṇṭumāvum meṟpaṭiyiṟ ṟacca muttu nūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟāṟum meṟpaṭiyār cāttum muttinpaṭṭikai Oṉṟiṉāl poṉṉiṉ pū Āṟum mukam Oṉṟum pon Irukaḻañcaraiye nālumañcāṭiyum meṟpaṭiyil caviyilum tūkkattilum tacca potti pattonpatum saprayoga m muppattoṉṟum mukattil
tacca parumut tañcu Uḷpaṭa mut tāyirattu muṉnūṟṟu muppattañcum meṟpaṭiyār cāttum poṉniṉ kāṟkāṟai Onṟināl pon pattoṉpatiṉ kaḻañce mukkāle muṉṟu mañcāṭiyu maṟumāvum Olokaviṭaṅkade var nampirāṭṭiyār cāttiyaruḷum muṭi yonṟu niṟai nāṟpatteṇ(ka)kaḻañce Onpatu mañcāṭiyuṅ The stone is mutilated to the extent offour letters.m meṟpaṭiyil kaṭṭina māṇikkam Oṉṟum saprayogam Eṇpattāṟum taruppu Iruṉūṟṟu nāṟpattoṉpatum potti patinālum meṟpaṭiyil kaṭṭina takaṭṭuppon kaḻañcaṟai ye kuṉṟiyum meṟpaṭiyil kotta muttu Eḻunūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟonpatum meṟpaṭiyil kotta veḷḷi kaḻañcaraiye muṉṟu mañcāṭiyum meṟpaṭiyār cāttum kutampai Oṉṟu poṉ kaḻañce mañcāṭiyu(m) mañcumāvum meṟpaṭiyiṟ kaṭṭina māṇikka monṟum tarup poṉpatum saprayoga m Oṉpatum potti nālum mut tirupattonṟum meṟpaṭiyār cāttiyaruḷum meṟpaṭi yoṉṟu pon kaḻañce mañcāṭiyu(m) mañcuvāyum meṟpaṭiyilk kaṭṭina māṇikka monṟum tarup ponpatum saprayoga m Oṉpatum potti nālum mut tirupattonṟum meṟpaṭiyār cāttiyaruḷum kampi Oraṇaiyināl tuṇṭa miraṇṭum Āṇi Iraṇṭu muṭpaṭa pon Irukaḻañce mukkāle Iraṇṭu mañcāṭiyum meṟpaṭiyār cāttum nilattin nuḻut toraṇaiyināl pon kaḻañcaraiyum meṟpaṭiyil nila miraṇṭum saprayoga mañcum taruppu pattum meṟpaṭiyār cārttum muttin nuḻut toraṇaiyināl pon kaḻañrai ye kunṟiyum mut tiraṇṭum saprayoga m yeḻum tarup
pu muṉṟum potti muṉṟum meṟpaṭiyār cāttum tiru Oṉṟum meṟpaṭiyil kotta nāṇ O(ra)ṉṟum paṭukaṇ ṇiraṇṭum kaḷḷippū Oṉṟum kokkuvāy Oṉṟum poṉ Irukaḻañce mukkāle muṉṟu mañcāṭiyum Aṟumāvum meṟpaṭiyār cārttum mālaitāli Irupattoṉṟum tāḷimpam Iraṇṭum Uḷpaṭa poṉ patiṉ Eṇkaḻañce kālum meṟpaṭiyil kaṭṭina saprayogam Aṟupatteṭṭum taruppu Eṇpatum potti Irupattiraṇṭum meṟpaṭiyil kaṭṭina takaṭṭup poṉ mukkāle Iraṇṭu mañcāṭiyum muṉṟumāvum meṟpaṭiyil kotta muttu Aimpatteḻum meṟpaṭiyār cārttum tanivaṭam Oṉṟu muttu muppattoṉṟum meṟppaṭiyār cārttum tirucaram Oṉṟu muttu Eṇpattāṟum muṉṟoṉṟāka Aṭikki viḷakkiṉa poṉnin tāḷimpa miraṇṭum paṭuka ṇiraṇṭum kokkuvāy Onṟum pon kaḻañcarai yum meṟpaṭiyār cāttum pañcacari Onṟum muttu nūṟṟeṇpatteṭṭum meṟpaṭiyiṟ ponnin ṉiṭaikkaṭṭiraṇṭum Añconṟāka Aṭikki viḷakkina tāḷimpa miraṇṭum paṭuka ṇoṉṟum kokkuvāy Oṉṟum pon mukkaḻañcaraiye Añcumāvum meṟpaṭiyār cāttum śrīcchan=ta m Onṟiṉāl muka moṉṟum Iṭaikkaṭṭu nālum tavaḷaivāy ṉāliyil cavukkam Oṉṟum pon kaḻañcarai yum meṟpaṭiyiṟ mukattiṟk kaṭṭina māṇikka moṉṟum taruppu patināḷum saprayoga m ṉālum potti nālum meṟpaṭiyil kotta tiruccaṉnavaṭam muṉṟiṉāl muttu Eḻunūṟṟaimpattiraṇṭum meṟppaṭiyār cārttum muttiṉvaḷaiyil Oṉṟum poṉ Oṉpatiṉ kaḻañcey mukkāle Araikkālum meṟpaṭiyil tacca mut tirunūṟṟoḻumRead ṟeḻum.meṟpaṭiyār cārttum meṟpaṭiy
poṉ Eṇkaḻañce kālum meṟpaṭiyil tacca muttu ṉūṟṟirupattārum meṟpaṭiyārcāttum muttiṉ paṭṭikaiy Oṉṟināl ponniṉ pū Eḻināl poṉ kaḻañce mukkāle mañcāṭiyum meṟpaṭiyil caviyilum tūkkattilum pūvilum taccapotti patiṉoṉṟum saprayogam patineṭṭum muttu Āyirattiruṉūṟṟu Aṟupatteḻum meṟpaṭiyār cāttiaruḷum muttiṉ kāṟkāṟai y Oṉṟināṟ poṉ Eḻukaḻañcum meṟpaṭiyil tacca muttu toṇṇūṟṟoṉṟum piḷḷaiyār subramaṇyade- var cāttum poṉnin muṭi Oṉṟu poṉ mukkaḻañ carai ye Arai kkālum meṟpaṭiyār cārttum cuṭṭi yoṉṟu poṉ Oṉpatumañcāṭiyum muṉṟumāvum meṟpaṭiyil kotta muttoṉṟum meṟpaṭiyār cārttum cūla moṉṟu poṉ Araikkaḻañcum meṟpaṭiyār cārttum Iṭukkuvaḷaiyil Iraṇṭu poṉmukkaḻañcum poṟpū Aimpattonṟināl pon Aimpatinkaḻañcum poṟpū nūṟināl pon nāṟpattonpatin kaḻañ carai ye nālumañcāṭiyu miraṇṭumāvum poṟpū Oṉṟu pon kaḻañce Iraṇṭu mañcāṭiyum poṟpū Oṉṟu pon kālum poṟpū patineṭṭināl pon patineṇ kaḻañce mañcāṭiyum ponniṉ taḷikai Oṉṟināl Alakunilaippaṭi pon nānūṟṟu nāṟpatteṇ kaḻañ caraiyum Oṭṭuvaṭṭil Oṉṟu Alaku nilaippaṭi pon Irunūṟṟuk kaḻañcum ponniṉ maṭa loṉṟu Alaku nilaippaṭi pon Aimpatin kaḻañcum mānavaṭṭil Oṉṟu niṟai poṉ patiṉnāṟkkaḻañcaraiye Araikkālum cāmaraikkai Oṉṟu poṉ Alaku nilaippaṭi poṉ muppatiṉ kaḻañcum meṟpaṭi Oṉṟu Alaku nilaippaṭi pon muppatiṉ kaḻañcum Īccoppik
kaiy yoṉṟu poṉ muppatiṉ kaḻañcum Īccoppikkai y yoṉṟu poṉ muppatiṉ kaḻañcum paḷḷittoṅkal makuṭam nāliṉāl cempiṉmelum panta ttilmelum tarukkiṉa poṉ Alakunilaippaṭi poṉ ṉūṟṟu Orupattu Oṉpatiṉ kaḻañce kālum veḷḷit taḷikai Oṉṟu ṉiṟai Alakunilaippaṭi ṉūṟṟaṟupattorukaḻañcum veḷḷi maṇṭai yoṉṟu Alakunilaippaṭi ṉūṟṟuttoṇṇūṟṟaiṅkaḻañcum meṟpaṭi veḷḷik kalaca moṉṟu Alakunilaippaṭi ṉūṟṟuk kaḻañcum veḷḷic caṭṭuvamoṉṟu meṟpaṭiniṟai toṇṇūṟṟu Eṇkaḻañcaraiy veḷḷik kaiccolam Oṉṟu meṟppaṭi niṟai muppatteṇ kaḻañcum ceppu taḷikai(kai)kaḷ Alakunilaippaṭi ceppu taḷikai Oṉṟu niṟai Irupatteṇ palam cepputaḷikai Oṉṟu niṟai patiṉpalam ceppu taḷikai niṟai Irupattu nāṟppalamceppu taḷikai Oṉṟu niṟai Irupattuiru palam cepput taḷikai Oṉṟu niṟaiyirupattaṟu palam ceppu taḷikai Oṉṟu niṟai Irupattaim palam ceppu palittālam Oṉṟu niṟai Aimpattunāṟ palam cempiṉ kaivaṭṭakai mukkilātitu Oṉṟu niṟai patineṇ palam ceppu taḷikai Oṉṟu niṟai Irupatteḻu palam ceppuk kāḷam Oṉṟu niṟai Irupatin palam ceppuk kāḷam Oṉṟu niṟai patinaiñpalam ceppuk kāḷam Oṉṟu niṟai patiṉnaṟu palam ceppu kāḷam Oṉṟu niṟai patiṉ (tiṉ)aimpalam tutturu Iraṇṭu niṟai patiṉnāṟp palam ceppu kalacam Oṉṟu niṟai Irupattuiru palam cempilmeṟ pon kaṭukkiṉa pāvaikkaṇṇāṭiyil Āṭukiṟa pāvai Oṉṟu mattaḷam ko(ṭ)ṭṭukiṟa pā
vai yoṉṟu Uṭukkai vācikkaṟa pāvai yoṉṟu pāṭukiṟa pāvai yoṉṟu piṭa moṉṟu Uḷppaṭa kaṇṇāṭi yoṉṟu niṟai Eṇpatiṉpalam tarā keṇṭi yoṉṟu niṟai Aimpatteṇ palam tarā caṅkukkāl Onṟu Aṟupalam tarāc caṅkukkāl nāṟpalam veṇtarāc caṅkukkāl Aimpalavaraiyum tarāc caṅkukkāl Aimpalamum tarāc caṭṭikkāl Oṉṟu niṟai nāṟppattaim palamum meṟpaṭi yoṉṟu niṟai Irupattunāṟpalam meṟpaṭi yoṉṟu niṟai nāṟpatiṉpalam tarāk(kāk) kāl Oṉṟu niṟai y Aṟupatteḻu palam meṟpaṭi Oṉṟiṉ niṟai Eṇpatteṇ palam meṟpaṭi Aṭṭaṇaikkāl Oṉṟin niṟai nūṟṟuampatiṉ palam meṟpaṭi Aṭṭaṇaikkāl Oṉṟiniṟai nūṟṟu Eḻupattai mpalam tūppāttiram Oṉṟi niṟai Ampatiṉ (pala)palam tūppāttira Oṉṟiṉ niṟai Oṉpatiṉpalam tiruccattiram Oṉṟiṉ niṟai Eḻupala varai tūṅkuviḷakkin talai Oṉṟin niṟai Aṟupalam tarā viḷakku Oṉṟu niṟai Aim(pa)pattu muppalam meṟpaṭi Īḻacciyal viḷak konṟu Uṭakkaruvum nārāyamu(m) muṭpaṭa niṟai Iruṉūṟṟu pa ṭi malaiyāṇciyal viḷakkoṉ ṟuṭkaruvoṭum nārāyattoṭum niṟai munnūṟṟu Irupatin palammalaiyāṇciyal viḷakkoṉṟu Uṭkaruvum nārāyamu(m) muṭpaṭa niṟai munnūṟṟu Orupatiṉ palam malaiyāṇciyal viḷakku Uṭkkaruvum nārāyamum muṭpaṭa niṟai munnūṟṟu Irupatin palamum coḻiyacciyal viḷakku Uḷkkaruvūm nārāyamum Uḷpaṭa niṟai nūṟṟu Aimpattu naāṟpalam meṟpaṭi viḷakku meṟpaṭi Uḷppaṭa niṟai Irunūṟṟu Irupatiṉ palamum meṟpaṭi viḷakku meṟpaṭi Uḷpaṭa niṟai
Aiññūṟṟu palam meṟpaṭi viḷakku meṟpaṭi Uḷpaṭa niṟai Irunūṟṟu Aṟupatiṉ palam meṟpaṭi viḷakku meṟpaṭi Uḷppaṭa niṟai patiṉneḻu palam Aṉantalai viḷakku Uḷkaruvum nārācamum Uḷpaṭa niṟai muṉṉūṟṟaṟupatin palam viḷak koṉṟu Uḷkaruvum ṉārāya muḷpaṭaṉiṟai Irupatarai palamum Ārkuṭa viḷakku Oṉṟu ṉiṟai ṉūṟṟu Eṇpattoṉpatiṉ palam meṟpaṭi viḷakku Oṉṟu ṉiṟaiya ṉūṟṟaṟupattaṟupalam Ākkupāṉaikkā loṉṟu ṉiṟaiy Eṇpatte palam meṟpaṭi pāṉaikkāl Oṉṟu niṟai nūṟṟu Orupatiṉpalam tarā caruvam Oṉṟin niṟai nūṟṟu Aimpatiṉ palam meṟpaṭi Oṉṟiṉ niṟai nūṟṟu Aṟupattu Aimpalam meṟpaṭi Oṉṟiṉ niṟai toṇṇūṟṟu palam meṟpaṭi Oṉṟu niṟai pattaṟu pala mēṟpaṭi Oṉṟiṉ niṟai Aimpatiṉ palam caruvaccaṭṭi Oṉṟin niṟai Aimpatiṉ palam meṟpaṭi Oṉṟiṉ niṟai nāṟpattu Aimpalam meṟpaṭi Oṉṟiṉ niṟai Irupattu Aimpalam meṟpaṭi Oṉṟin niṟai Aimpattu Irupalam caThe stone is mutilated here. patinmuppalam meṟpaṭi Oṉṟu niṟai Aimpalam meṟpaṭi Onṟu niṟai patinaiñ palam veṇkalam Ilaitaṭṭu Oṉṟu niṟai muppalam kākamukiḻ Onṟu niṟai Aimpalam taḷikai Onṟu niṟai Aimpattu nāṟpalam caṭṭuvam Oṉṟuniṟai patiṉmuppalam tūpamaṇi Oṉṟiṉ niṟai Irupatin(p) palam Eṟimaṇi Onṟuniṟai nūṟṟu Eḻupattaṟupalam meṟpaṭi Oṉṟiṉ niṟai nāṟpattu muppalam tūpamaṇi Oṉṟiṉ niṟai Irupala varai cekaṇṭikai Oṉṟinniṟai nūṟṟirupatiṉ palam
meṟpaṭi yoṉṟu niṟai nūṟṟaim palam kaimaṇi Oraṇai niṟai Aimpatteṇ palam .
Digital edition of SII 5.521 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
